basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate I/ Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has published the Research AssociateI/ Jr. Research Fellow Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Research Associate I/ Jr. Research Fellow positions. Candidates holding a PhD in semiconductor quantum optics/ultrafast optics (experimental) with relevant hands-on experience, or a First Class B.Tech./ Master’s degree with knowledge of semiconductor physics and NET/ GATE qualification, are eligible to apply through Email. The application process will remain open until 20-07-2026, and candidates can access the official notification

age_limit.details: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned. Age relaxation of 5% marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD with semiconductor quantum optics/ultrafast optics (experimental) background, with proper hands-on knowledge of building optical setups., 1st class Bachelor degree (B.Tech.)/Masters degree with knowledge of semiconductor physics with NET/GATE qualification.
qualification.details: Research Associate-I: PhD with semiconductor quantum optics/ultrafast optics (experimental) background, with proper hands-on knowledge of building optical setups. Jr. Research Fellow: 1st class Bachelor degree (B.Tech.)/Masters degree with knowledge of semiconductor physics with NET/GATE qualification. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

salary_details.details: Research Associate-I: Rs.58,000/-p.m. plus HRA @ 27% Jr. Research Fellow: Rs.37,000/-p.m. plus 27% HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_delhi_iit: PhD with semiconductor quantum optics/ultrafast optics (experimental) background, with proper hands-on knowledge of building optical setups., 1st class Bachelor degree (B.Tech.)/Masters degree with knowledge of semiconductor physics with NET/GATE qualification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate-I: PhD with semiconductor quantum optics/ultrafast optics (experimental) background, with proper hands-on knowledge of building optical setups. Jr. Research Fellow: 1st class Bachelor degree (B.Tech.)/Masters degree with knowledge of semiconductor physics with NET/GATE qualification. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned. Age relaxation of 5% marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Associate-I: Rs.58,000/-p.m. plus HRA @ 27% Jr. Research Fellow: Rs.37,000/-p.m. plus 27% HRA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate-I and Jr. Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by IIT Delhi for the positions of Research Associate-I and Jr. Research Fellow. One vacancy is for Research Associate-I and the other is for Jr. Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: For the Jr. Research Fellow post, candidates must possess a 1st class Bachelor's degree (B.Tech.) or Master's degree with knowledge of semiconductor physics and a valid NET/GATE qualification. Graduates from CFTIs with a CGPA above 8.000 may be exempted from NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate-I position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 58,000/- plus 27% HRA. This is a contractual position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate-I and Jr. Research Fellow positions at IIT Delhi will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies IIT Delhi as the location, which is in New Delhi. While the application is via email, the job is based in Delhi. Candidates should consider relocation if selected.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Research Associate-I and Jr. Research Fellow at IIT Delhi are contractual in nature. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
